nasb.text: For the enemy has persecuted my soul; He has crushed my life to the ground; He has made me dwell in dark places, like those who have long been dead.

esv.text: For the enemy has pursued my soul; he has crushed my life to the ground; he has made me sit in darkness like those long dead.

cnv.text: 仇敵逼迫我， 把我壓倒在地， 使我住在黑暗之處， 像死了很久的人一樣。

ccb.text: 敌人迫害我，打垮我， 使我生活在黑暗中， 像死去很久的人。

csbs.text: 仇敌追逼我， 把我的生命压碎在地； 他使我住在黑暗之地， 如同死了很久的人。
